name: Nixie Divergence
descs:
First Turn Start of an Encounter: inflict 4 [Vibration] Potency and 4 [Vibration] Count to all enemies. (Or all Abnormality parts)

When hitting an enemy with an Envy Affinity Skill, inflict 2 [Vibration] Potency on target.

First Turn Start of a wave: inflict 4 [Vibration] Potency and 4 [Vibration] Count to all enemies (or all Abnormality parts)

When hitting an enemy with an Envy Affinity Skill, inflict 2 [Vibration] Potency on target.

First Turn Start of a wave: inflict 5 [Vibration] Potency and 5 [Vibration] Count to all enemies (or all Abnormality parts)

When hitting an enemy with an Envy Affinity Skill, inflict 3 [Vibration] Potency on target.
